title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 03 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 03 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 03 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 03/06/2024
DCE iron ore futures market falling trends, the main contract closed 843.5. an decrease of 2.65% throughout the day;some traders were negative to sell, and some traders are unable to sell due to lockdowns; Some steel procurement more cautious, the continuation of a small number of multi-frequency procurement strategy. PBF at Shandong port dealt 840-850 yuan/mt;decreased 10-20 yuan/mt from last Friday.
